log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Loxodon — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Loxodon — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Loxodon — Iron Concentration HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 24 damage. Loxodon — Iron Concentration HP: 24/67
--- Loxodon — Iron Concentration --- HP: 24/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Loxodon — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Loxodon — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Loxodon — Iron Concentration HP: 6/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 23 damage. Loxodon — Iron Concentration HP: -17/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Loxodon — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Loxodon — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
